## Notes
- Stage 0 is live-confirmed as implementation, but not operationally closed until dirty state is resolved by staging/committing or explicitly isolating excluded drift.
- Full mirror parity is clean as of this boundary definition.
- Remaining blocker is governed/workspace dirty state, not broken continuity logic.
